name: TCIL_AssignReceiver
title: TCIL_AssignReceiver
syntax: long TCIL_AssignReceiver(dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source) // form 1
long TCIL_AssignReceiver(dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource) // form 2
long TCIL_AssignReceiver(dbNode tc, dword ddi, dbNode user, dword elementNumberUser, dbNode source) // form 3
long TCIL_AssignReceiver(dbNode tc, dword ddi, dword addressUser, dword elementNumberUser, dword addressSource) // form 4
description: The functions sends an Assign Receiver message to the setpoint value user device.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: This DDI and the element number specify the setpoint value user.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: addressUser
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value user.

parameters.name: elementNumberUser
parameters.description: The combination of this element number and the DDI receives data from the setpoint value source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: addressSource
parameters.description: Address of the peer control capable device which acts as a setpoint value source.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
